cover_prompt: Create a vertical image of a luxurious invitation envelope in deep lilac silk, adorned with an ornate wax seal of matching lilac hue featuring a delicate swirl motif reflecting the 'Enrolados' theme, set against a softly blurred background of lilac-toned drapery and subtle bokeh lights, cinematic lighting highlighting the texture of the envelope fabric and the glossy seal, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, ultra‑realistic 3D render, Critical: No text.
sheet_prompt: Ultra-detailed hyper-realistic 3D render of a blank ornamental invitation card, rectangular shape with a lilac‑gradient paper base, surrounded by an elaborate baroque frame of aged silver filigree intertwined with lilac‑colored vines and subtle swirl patterns echoing the 'Enrolados' motif, positioned in an elegant lilac‑hued hall with soft ambient light, the center of the card left intentionally blank for later text overlay, cinematic depth of field showcasing the luxurious texture and reflective metal, Critical: No text.
